title: Mali junta leader names himself defence minister after predecessor killed
content: Former Defence Minister Sadio Camara was killed in a massive offensive by combined jihadist and separatist forces.

originalTitle: New alliance shakes up Nigerian political landscape
title: New alliance shakes up Nigerian political landscape
content: Peter Obi and Rabiu Kwankwaso, who came third and fourth respectively in the last elections, switch parties.

originalTitle: BBC uncovers the Ugandan scammers abusing dogs to elicit donations from animal lovers
title: Helping Paws: Be Smart About Being Kind!
content:
Hello, My Young Friends!

Hello, everyone! It’s me, Aisha, your friendly African news reporter. I am here to share something important with you today. We are going to talk about our animal friends, especially dogs. We will learn how to be kind to them and also how to be very smart. It’s important to always use our brains and our kind hearts together! Let's make sure our kindness helps real animals.

Our Wonderful Dogs

Dogs are truly amazing creatures, aren't they? Many of us have dogs at home or see them in our villages and towns. They are loyal and loving pets. Dogs play with us, they can protect our homes, and they wag their tails to show us they are happy. They are often called "man's best friend" because they are so close to people. Dogs need food, clean water, a safe place to sleep, and lots of love. Just like you need your family, dogs need someone to care for them. They rely on us to keep them safe and healthy. Our animal friends deserve to live happy lives. Did you know? Dogs can understand many words we say! They can also feel happy, sad, and even scared. They show their feelings in different ways, like wagging their tails or putting their ears down.

Being Kind to Animals

It feels good to be kind, doesn't it? Being kind to animals means we help them when they are in trouble. If we see a lost puppy, we can tell a grown-up. If an animal is hungry, we can try to give it food and water, with a grown-up's help. We always want to do good things for animals. Many people around the world love animals very much. They want to make sure all animals are safe and healthy. This kindness makes the world a better place for everyone, including our furry friends. Helping animals is a kind and good thing to do for our planet. Did you know? There are special places called "animal shelters." These are like hospitals and homes for animals that don't have a family yet. People there help animals get better and find new homes. It's a wonderful place where animals get care and love.

A Tricky Problem

Now, let's talk about something a little tricky. Sometimes, there are people who are not kind. These people might try to trick others. They might pretend to help animals, but they don't really. They do it to get money. We call these people "scammers." A scammer is someone who plays a trick to get things they want, like money, from kind people. They don't use the money to help animals. This makes us sad because the animals don't get the help they need. We want to be careful and not let these tricky people fool us.

How They Try to Trick Us

These scammers often use the internet or social media. They might show very sad pictures or videos of dogs. The dogs might look very thin, sick, or hurt. They want kind people to feel very sorry for the dogs. When you see a sad picture, your heart wants to help, right? That’s what they hope for. They then ask people to send money. They say the money is to buy food or medicine for the sad dogs. They make big promises that they will use the money to make the dogs better and healthy again. Did you know? It's easy for people to share pictures and videos online. But not everything you see online is true. Always ask a grown-up to help you understand what you see. They can help you know what is real and what is not.

Where Does the Money Go?

Here is the sad part: when kind people send money, the scammers do not use it to help the dogs. They keep the money for themselves. The poor dogs stay hungry, sick, or hurt. They do not get any help at all, even though kind people wanted to help them. The kind people who wanted to help don't know that their money did not go to the animals. This is why it’s so important to be smart and careful. We want to make sure our kindness truly helps those who need it most. We want the money to go to real animal shelters or real animal doctors, not to tricky people who keep it.

What Can We Do? Be Smart!

So, what can we do when we want to help animals? We can be very smart and thoughtful! First, always talk to a grown-up you trust. Ask your mom, dad, teacher, or an elder. They can help you understand if something is real or a trick. Always get their advice before doing anything online or with money. Second, if someone asks for money for animals online, be very careful. Grown-ups should always check if the person or group is real. Do they have a proper office? Do they have real people working there to help animals? Do they have real stories of animals they have helped? Third, it's often best to help groups that you know and trust. For example, a local animal shelter or animal hospital in your town or city. You might even be able to visit them with a grown-up and see the animals they help! This way, you can see your help in action. Did you know? Many schools teach children how to be safe online. This includes not trusting everything you see and always asking a grown-up for help. It's like learning to look both ways before crossing the road, but for the internet!

Helping Animals the Right Way

There are many good ways to help animals that are safe and real. You can volunteer with your grown-ups at a local animal shelter. This means you can help clean, play with the animals, or give them food and water. You can also collect old blankets or towels for the shelter. These things help make the animals comfortable and warm. If you want to give money, ask your grown-ups to give it directly to a trusted animal hospital or shelter. This way, you know your kindness is really making a difference. Your money will go straight to food, medicine, or a safe bed for an animal in need. This is the best way to help! Did you know? Even small acts of kindness, like sharing your banana with a hungry bird (if it's safe for them to eat!), can make a difference. Being kind feels good for you too! Kindness makes everyone feel better, animals and people.

Let's All Be Kind and Smart!

My dear friends, it’s wonderful to have a kind heart and to want to help animals. But it’s even better when we use our smart brains too. Remember to always ask questions, talk to grown-ups, and make sure your kindness goes to the right place. Together, we can make sure our animal friends get the help they truly need. Let’s protect them and make our African communities full of care and safety for all living things. Thank you for listening, and keep being amazing!

originalTitle: For Christians in Israel and Jerusalem, intolerance is becoming normal
title: Let's Be Kind: A Story from Far Away!
content:
Hello, my super friends! I'm your friendly African news reporter, and I'm here to share some important news with you, all the way from a special city called Jerusalem. Grab your listening ears, because this story is about something super important: being kind to everyone!

Hello from Africa!

Hi everyone! It's me, your news friend from sunny Africa! I love telling you stories about what's happening around the world. Today, we're going to talk about a very important lesson: how we should always be kind and friendly to everyone, no matter where they come from, what they look like, or what special beliefs they have. Just like we learn to share our toys and be nice to all our friends at school, people all over the world need to remember to be kind too. This is a big idea, but it's super important for making the world a happy place for everyone!

What is Intolerance?

Sometimes, grown-ups use a big word called 'intolerance.' It sounds long, right? But it just means *not being kind* to someone because they are different from you. Imagine if you didn't want to play with a friend just because they had a different coloured shirt, or because they like a different fruit than you. That wouldn't be very kind, would it? Intolerance is when people are not nice to others because they have different ideas, different ways of praying, or come from different places. It's like saying, "I don't like you because you're not exactly like me." That's not how we make friends or make the world a happy place! Did you know? Being kind to others makes *you* feel happy too! When you share your snack or give a friend a hug, your heart feels warm and bubbly!

Far Away in Jerusalem!

Now, let's fly far, far away on our imaginary news airplane to a very old and special city called Jerusalem. Jerusalem is not in Africa; it's in a country called Israel, which is a bit far from us. This city is super unique because many different people who believe in different things live there. It's like a big rainbow of people, all with their own special ways of praying and living. For thousands and thousands of years, people who are Christian, people who are Jewish, and people who are Muslim have all lived in Jerusalem. They all think Jerusalem is a very holy and special place. It’s like a place where many big, special stories began. Did you know? Jerusalem is sometimes called the 'Holy City' because it's important to three big religions in the world! Imagine how many special buildings and stories are there!

Who are Christians?

In Jerusalem, and all over the world, there are people called Christians. Christians are people who believe in Jesus and follow his teachings, which are all about love, kindness, and helping others. They go to special buildings called churches to pray, and they have many beautiful songs and stories. Many Christians have lived in Jerusalem for a very, very long time, even for thousands of years! They have special churches and holy places there that are very important to them. Just like you might have a special place in your home, Christians have special places in Jerusalem. Did you know? The cross is a very important symbol for Christians, reminding them of Jesus and his love. You might see it on churches or necklaces!

A Sad Story from Jerusalem

Now, for the part of our story that makes us a little sad. In Jerusalem, there are special ladies called nuns. Nuns are Christian women who dedicate their lives to praying, helping people, and being very kind. They often wear special clothes that show they are nuns. Recently, one of these kind nuns was walking in Jerusalem. But someone was not kind to her. Someone hurt her. This is what grown-ups call an 'assault.' It means someone hurt her in a way that was not friendly or kind at all. Imagine if someone pushed you for no reason – that's not nice, right? This special lady, a nun who spends her life being kind, was not treated kindly at all. This made many people very sad, because we should always be kind and respectful to everyone, especially people who dedicate their lives to helping others. Did you know? Nuns often work in schools, hospitals, or orphanages, helping children and people who need care. They are like real-life superheroes of kindness!

Why is This Happening?

It's sad to think that someone would hurt a nun. Sometimes, people forget to be kind because they don't understand others who are different from them. They might think their way is the only way, and they might forget that everyone deserves to be safe and happy. When people show 'intolerance,' it means they are forgetting this very important lesson. We all live on the same big Earth, and we all share the same sky and the same sunshine. We should treat everyone with a warm heart and a friendly smile, even if their ideas or ways of praying are a little bit different from ours. Being different makes the world more colourful and exciting, not scary! Did you know? We have many different languages and cultures right here in Africa! But we still find ways to be friends and live together peacefully.

What Can We Do? Be Kind!

So, what can *you* do about this? Even though this happened far away, you can make a difference right here, right now! You can choose to be kind every single day. You can share your toys, play with new friends, and always speak with a kind voice. When you see someone who is different, you can try to understand them and be friendly. In Africa, we know how important it is for different people to live together in peace and friendship. We have so many different tribes and traditions, but we are all one big family. We can teach the world that being kind and friendly is the best way to live. Did you know? Even a small act of kindness, like saying 'please' and 'thank you,' can make someone's whole day brighter!

Our Hope for the World

This story from Jerusalem reminds us that we need to keep teaching everyone, grown-ups and kids, to always choose kindness. We want a world where everyone feels safe, happy, and respected, no matter what they believe. Let's all promise to be the kindest kids we can be, and spread sunshine wherever we go. Because when we are kind, we make the world a better, happier place for everyone! Thank you for listening, my wonderful friends! Stay kind and stay curious!
summary: This news story is about why it's important to be kind and friendly to everyone, even if they have different beliefs, and how some people in a faraway city called Jerusalem are not being kind to Christians.
whyMatters: It's important to be kind to everyone, no matter what they believe or where they come from. We all want to live in a world where everyone is safe and happy, and this story helps us remember to always choose kindness and respect.

originalTitle: Brazil’s Lula to travel to US to meet with Trump later this week
title: Two Big Leaders to Meet Soon!
content:
Hello From Your Friendly Reporter!

Hello, my wonderful friends across Africa! It's your friendly news reporter, always ready to share exciting stories from our big, beautiful world. Today, we have some special news from very, very far away! It's about two important people who lead their countries.

Meet President Lula of Brazil!

Our story starts with a leader named President Lula. He is the main leader of a country called Brazil. Brazil is a super big country! It's very far from us, across a big ocean. Brazil has amazing rainforests with lots of green trees and cool animals. These forests are like giant green lungs for our Earth. President Lula works very hard to help all the people in Brazil. He wants them to be happy, healthy, and have good schools to learn in. Did you know? Brazil is so big that it has the world's largest rainforest! It's called the Amazon rainforest, and many unique animals live there, like colourful parrots, speedy jaguars, and curious monkeys!

Meet President Trump of the USA!

Now, let's meet our second special leader. His name is President Trump. He is the main leader of another very big country called the United States of America. We often just say the USA! The USA is also very far from us, in a different part of the world. It has big cities with tall buildings, and wide open spaces. President Trump also works very hard to take care of all the people in the USA. He wants his country to be strong and peaceful. Did you know? The USA has a very famous statue called the Statue of Liberty! It's a giant lady holding a torch high up in the sky, and it's a symbol of freedom and friendship for everyone!

What Does a President Do?

You might be asking, "What exactly does a president do?" Well, imagine your school principal. They help make sure everyone in the school is safe, learning, and getting along. A president is like that, but for a whole country! They are in charge of helping millions and millions of people. They make sure everyone has what they need, like food, homes, and roads. Presidents also help their country be friends with other countries. It's a very big and very important job that helps many people.

Why Are These Big Leaders Meeting?

President Lula and President Trump are going to meet very soon! This is like two very important friends getting together to talk about important things. When leaders from different countries meet, they talk about how their countries can help each other. They might talk about good ideas for everyone. Maybe they will talk about making the world a safer place for all kids. Or how to protect our beautiful Earth, like saving the big rainforests in Brazil! Did you know? Talking to friends helps solve problems and make good plans! When leaders talk, they can make plans that help people in their own countries and even people all around the world!

Where Will They Meet? The White House!

This special meeting will happen in a very famous house. It's called the White House! The White House is in the USA. It's where the President of the USA lives and works every day. It's a big, beautiful white building with many rooms. Imagine living in a house where you also do all your very important work! That's what the White House is for the US President. It's a place for big decisions. Did you know? The White House has 132 rooms, 35 bathrooms, and even 28 fireplaces! That's a lot of rooms for one house, isn't it? It's been the home and office for US presidents for over 200 years!

How Will President Lula Get There?

Brazil is very, very far from the USA. So, President Lula will travel a long way to get to the meeting! He will likely fly in a big airplane. Airplanes can take people across big oceans and continents, high above the clouds. It takes many hours to fly from Brazil to the USA. It's a very long journey, but it's important for these leaders to meet face-to-face to talk. Did you know? There are five big parts of land on Earth called continents! Africa is one, and North America (where the USA is) and South America (where Brazil is) are two others! That's a lot of land to travel over!

What Might They Talk About?

When President Lula and President Trump meet, they will have lots to discuss. They might talk about how their countries can trade things. Trade means selling and buying things from each other. Like if Brazil grows yummy fruits, and the USA makes cool toys, they can share! This helps both countries. They might also talk about being good friends and helping each other if there are problems in the world. Being friendly helps everyone feel safe and happy. Did you know? Countries trade all sorts of things, from delicious coffee and special spices to new computers and big machines! This helps people everywhere have more choices and things they need.

Why Does This Matter to Us in Africa?

You might be thinking, "Brazil and the USA are so far away! Why is this meeting important for me here in Africa?" Well, when leaders from big countries talk and become friends, it helps make the whole world a better place for everyone. It's like when kids in your class are kind to each other – everyone feels happier and safer. When presidents make good plans together, it can help the way countries work together all over the world. This can bring peace, new ideas, and help to many people, even in Africa! We are all part of one big global family, and when leaders talk, it's good for our whole family. Their decisions can help us all. Did you know? Africa is a giant continent, full of amazing animals, beautiful landscapes, and many different countries and cultures! We are a very important and wonderful part of the world!

That's All For Now!

So, get ready! Soon, President Lula from Brazil and President Trump from the USA will meet. They will talk and make plans. It's a big step for friendship between countries. We hope their meeting helps make our world even better and brighter for everyone, everywhere! That's all for now, my lovely listeners! Keep smiling, keep learning, and stay curious!
summary: President Lula from Brazil and President Trump from the USA will meet very soon at the White House to talk about important things and make the world a better place for everyone.
whyMatters: When important leaders from big countries talk and become friends, it helps make the whole world a safer and happier place for all of us, including people in Africa, because their decisions can affect everyone.
